source_meta.source_document: Variable Angle LCP Two-Column Volar Distal Radius Plate

systems.system_notes: Variable-angle volar distal radius locking plate family within the DePuy Synthes trauma plating portfolio.

trays.tray_name: Distal Radius Plate and Instrument Set
trays.tray_notes: Official DePuy Synthes materials describe dedicated distal radius plating instrumentation used with the variable-angle volar plate family.

components.component_notes: Official J&J MedTech materials describe the variable-angle two-column volar distal radius plate family.
Official inventory and technique materials describe compatible locking screw fixation used with the distal radius plate system.
Official technique materials describe guides and instrumentation for controlled distal radius screw placement.

unresolved_items.raw_text: Current official sources identify the plate family, instrumentation workflow, and coded inventory form but a full normalized product matrix has not yet been extracted in this pass.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper inventory-control and sterile implant listing pass is required for comprehensive product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
